qas.a: Preventative services will be completely covered

qas.a: The doctor tells you to bill for an unecessary procedures that was done

qas.a: The doctor tells you to bill for an undocumented procedure

qas.a: Both patient and health plan identifiers

qas.a: Deception with the intent to benefit

qas.a: The facts must never be changed

qas.a: Treatment, payment, and health care operations

qas.a: If a service is not documented, it cannot be billed.

qas.a: Both staff training and internal communications
